headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

_csp_future_note: Wenn Supabase Auth + Stripe Payments live gehen, den CSP-Header oben durch diesen ersetzen:
_csp_with_supabase_stripe: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://js.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.stripe.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.stripe.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://*.supabase.co
_permissions_policy_future_note: Mit Stripe Payments: payment=('self' 'https://js.stripe.com') statt payment=()
